name: understand-anything
description: Codex-native port of Understand-Anything — analyze, visualize, and explain any codebase as an interactive knowledge graph.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze any codebase into an interactive knowledge graph, tours, and onboarding guides.
interface.longDescription: Codex CLI port of Understand-Anything. Produces a knowledge-graph.json from any codebase via parallel multi-agent analysis, then powers an interactive dashboard, guided tours, diff analysis, domain extraction, and onboarding guides. Originally created by Egonex-AI (MIT); this is a Codex-harness adaptation.
defaultPrompt: Use the understand skill to analyze this codebase into a knowledge graph.
Use the understand-onboard skill to generate an onboarding guide for this project.
Use the understand-explain skill to deep-dive a specific file or module.
